category_sources: source_facts.description says Pandora client with multiple control interfaces; official pianod2 documentation describes a multi-source network-controlled music player daemon.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pianod; official homepage is for pianod/pianod2 and package executables include pianod.
docs_sources: Official Devious Fish documentation page provides pianod2 protocol and user documentation; official homepage lists setup, command, API, and Doxygen documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Devious Fish pages expose downloads and documentation, but no stable public source-control repository URL was confirmed from official sources.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify multiple control interfaces; official documentation describes text, JSON, and WebSocket/browser control.
